input.final_summary: Scanned 213 user turns across 45 qualifying JSONL files (UUID prefix 0–5). Found 2 in-scope known portfolio IDs plus 12 additional strong_highlight or portfolio-plausible windows; 4 known Arleif candidates were out of scope for this UUID filter.

content.text:
## Scan scope

- **Source:** `D:\Downloads\20260618-114047\20260618-114047\.cursor\projects\workspaces-agno\agent-transcripts`
- **Filter:** Parent folder UUID starts with `0`–`5` only
- **Files scanned:** 43 parent JSONL + 2 qualifying subagents with user messages (`075a4797…/be9573a4…`, `11ab1d30…/d5bc53b1…`) = **45 files**
- **User turns scanned:** **213**
- **Rubric:** hybrid v2.5 (`data/high_bar_window_rubric.md`)

## Known existing candidate IDs encountered

| ID | In this scan? | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `07653483-26ce-4cc7-8b23-0af4d92789a2` | **Yes** | 2 portfolio windows confirmed |
| `a5481311-6fe8-4be2-b534-f38c89ee28c3` | No | UUID prefix `a` — excluded |
| `e11ea567-00cf-4c92-912f-631f91895502` | No | UUID prefix `e` — excluded |
| `82a3118c-7689-4255-b2ad-2c638a8e88a0` | No | UUID prefix `8` — excluded |
| `da4ffd93-fdc5-4848-8014-8c9028a29415` | No | UUID prefix `d` — excluded |

---

## Portfolio-ready (in-scope)

### 1. Undo fanout / end-to-end design owner
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turns ~195–196
- **key_user_move:** “undo the fan out… split brain problems… domain architect design the business and presentation layer right at the start… end to end sequence diagram”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would likely add coordination/integration roles, not remove fanout after a PR failure.
- **attribution_basis:** Assistant had added `integration-designer` + fanout; user supplied reversal, split-brain diagnosis, and end-to-end ownership standard.
- **likely label:** `mindblowing_portfolio` · **score:** 10 · **portfolio_ready:** yes
- **why:** Anchored in PR #30 failure; rewrites spec/prompts to one accountable architect + review, not more decomposition.

### 2. Compile-time contract pushback
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turns ~31–34
- **key_user_move:** Challenges compile-time breakage = improper coupling; reasserts fail-fast typed SDK philosophy.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Generic LLM would repeat deletability/decoupling boilerplate without distinguishing intended contract breakage.
- **attribution_basis:** Flawed rule came from assistant; user introduced project philosophy and forced correction.
- **likely label:** `outstanding_portfolio` · **score:** 9 · **portfolio_ready:** yes
- **why:** Material `_architecture.md` rewrite; slightly less system-defining than the fanout reversal.

---

## Strong highlights / portfolio-plausible (in-scope)

### 3. Route-mode problem invalidation
- **Ref:** `12fdcf39…jsonl` · turn ~8
- **key_user_move:** “if you cut case C then we only need agnos default router mode… problem statement is invalid”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would preserve custom handoff/orchestration design.
- **attribution_basis:** User reframed product requirement; assistant had over-engineered Case C.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` (borderline `outstanding_portfolio`) · **score:** 7–8 · **portfolio_ready:** no
- **why:** Rare problem-statement kill switch; weaker durable-artifact proof than top windows.

### 4. Verbatim delegation → mechanical fix
- **Ref:** `26a0332a…jsonl` · turns ~1, 40–42
- **key_user_move:** Leader must pass user input verbatim; logs prove router wraps `"hi"` with instructions → accept `determine_input_for_members=False`.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would keep prompt-tuning band-aids.
- **attribution_basis:** User set ownership invariant; log evidence + course correction to framework flag is user-driven.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 8 · **portfolio_ready:** no
- **why:** Strong steering/recovery; portfolio anatomy thin on business stakes.

### 5. Platform vs product boundary (Provisioner)
- **Ref:** `11ab1d30…jsonl` · turn ~229
- **key_user_move:** Devpod + optional web terminal = platform; RebaseAI bootstrap/auth/commands = product, using platform devpod.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would keep monolithic `ProvisionService` at platform layer.
- **attribution_basis:** Assistant had merged layers; user drew durable ownership boundary.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` (borderline `outstanding_portfolio`) · **score:** 8 · **portfolio_ready:** no
- **why:** Clear architecture judgment; subagent carried much implementation detail.

### 6. Langfuse single source of truth
- **Ref:** `11ab1d30…jsonl` · turn ~108; also `26150c5f…` turn ~43
- **key_user_move:** “I DO NOT WANT 2 versions… spend weeks debugging why the product is not behaving”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would tolerate local fallbacks / dual prompt copies.
- **attribution_basis:** User imposed operational invariant; assistant had repo + Langfuse coexistence.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 7 · **portfolio_ready:** no
- **why:** Strong leverage-at-scale move; less rare than architecture reversals.

### 7. Cross-domain FK / join tradeoff
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turns ~47–49
- **key_user_move:** “where did you source…?” then “are you sure we will get away with never joining… what are we losing?”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would accept assistant’s absolute no-FK/no-join stance.
- **attribution_basis:** User demanded provenance + cost/benefit; assistant softened to anchor-FK modular-monolith model.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 7–8 · **portfolio_ready:** no
- **why:** Excellent tradeoff judgment; partly validates assistant-sourced ladder.

### 8. Workflow vs unbounded team debate
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turn ~91
- **key_user_move:** Domain designers pushing back on architect “is not a real workflow” without scripted N-iteration cap.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would accept open-ended architect/designer negotiation.
- **attribution_basis:** User named process-design invariant from existing coder-reviewer pattern.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 6–7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 9. PR #30 root-cause framing
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turn ~169
- **key_user_move:** “look at this PR… only data layer… DoD/issue or prompts?”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would treat as one-off bad output, not workflow-structure failure.
- **attribution_basis:** User tied symptom to upstream guidance; precedes fanout undo.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 6–7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 10. Design-folder simplification
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turn ~237
- **key_user_move:** Keep durable `ADRs` + `domain-map.md`; disposable `.rebaseai/design/<slug>.md`; coder reads `/design/` itself.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would proliferate durable flow docs in `design/`.
- **attribution_basis:** User anti-staleness standard; assistant had expanded artifact tree.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 11. Prompt minimalism / present-tense prompts
- **Ref:** `07653483…jsonl` · turn ~270
- **key_user_move:** “why are we telling it what is not present… conversations and design history affect the prompts… keep it minimal”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would leave negative/historical prompt scaffolding.
- **attribution_basis:** User meta-standard for prompt authorship; assistant had absorbed chat history into prompts.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 12. Planner e2e slice + flat issues
- **Ref:** `26150c5f…jsonl` · turn ~12
- **key_user_move:** Prefer user-facing e2e slices over data-layer-only; reject “exactly one done when”; flat issues with `milestone:` field not nested templates.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would keep milestone-nested templates and single DoD statement pressure.
- **attribution_basis:** User corrected sizing/nesting failure mode assistant had proposed.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 13. Concierge prompt / routing critique (opening)
- **Ref:** `12fdcf39…jsonl` · turn ~1
- **key_user_move:** Reject open-world “backend/state” routing test; prefer closed-world PRODUCT INFO check; cut resume phrase lists and obvious rules.
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would iterate on verbose babysitting prompt.
- **attribution_basis:** User supplied routing philosophy before assistant’s sticky-routing synthesis.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 6–7 · **portfolio_ready:** no

### 14. ADR decision quality bar
- **Ref:** `12fdcf39…jsonl` · turn ~25
- **key_user_move:** “Just saying ‘does not need’ is not enough… next person wondering ‘I'm just going to change it to #2’ should think twice”
- **generic_llm_counterfactual:** Would leave weak “chosen/not chosen” ADR prose.
- **attribution_basis:** User raised documentation standard; assistant expanded decision rationale.
- **likely label:** `strong_highlight` · **score:** 6 · **portfolio_ready:** no

---

## Summary counts

| Tier | Count (in-scope) |
|---|---:|
| Portfolio-ready | **2** |
| Strong highlight / plausible | **12** |
| Known IDs in scan | **1** (`07653483`) |
| Known IDs out of scan | **4** |

**Dominant transcript:** `07653483…` carries most portfolio-grade material in the 0–5 slice. Highest new finds outside it: `12fdcf39…` (routing reframe), `26a0332a…` (verbatim delegation), `11ab1d30…` (platform/product + Langfuse SSoT).
